name: Kahf.day: Dual-Field Cosmology Live
description: A dual-caustic cosmological map of the Quranic Source Code. Explores the 2↔3↔2→7 circuit through the antiparallel architecture of the Pen (Sound Field/Recording) and the Book (Light Field/Holding), resolving the trajectory from the cave (18:10) to the return (17:1).
